title: A New Music Studio
article_text: A musician got a license to open a small music studio. He will need to rely on his band members to help him. The room has a narrow door but a lovely soft sofa inside. He must succeed with his unique idea for the studio. His identity as an artist is important for his work. He has a desk with an empty tea cup on it. The law does not permit wild parties here, seriously. He will get a commission from every instrument he sells. An investor joined the association to support the project. The practical plan will protect the studio and largely reduce the rent they pay.

sentences.en: A musician got a license to open a small music studio.
sentences.zh: 一位音乐家获得了开办一个小型音乐工作室的许可证。

sentences.en: The room has a narrow door but a lovely soft sofa inside.

image_prompts: A musician holding a license document in front of a small music studio with a guitar inside.
A man talking to his band members, who are holding musical instruments, in a friendly way.
A room with a narrow wooden door, and inside a lovely soft sofa with cushions.
A man thinking with a light bulb above his head, showing a unique idea for a studio.
A close-up of an artist's face with a badge that says 'Artist Identity' on his shirt.
A wooden desk with an empty teacup on it, and a window behind showing daylight.
A sign on a wall that says 'No wild parties' with a serious face icon next to it.
A man selling a guitar to a customer, with a money sign showing commission.
An investor shaking hands with a person, and a building with an association sign behind them.
A studio with protective walls, a chart showing reduced rent, and a row of chairs.
